title: Segment 1: Proof of Concept
description: 200-hour venture incubator segment focused on vision, market understanding, operations, professional readiness, and proof-of-concept venture board presentation.
milestoneObjective: Demonstrate a viable proof-of-concept venture with portfolio, business plan, and competency evidence ready for Hour 200 Venture Board review.
capstoneDescription: Present your venture concept, market thesis, and 3-year blueprint to faculty and mentors for Segment 1 certification.
exitRequirements: Complete all five week integrations with submitted portfolio artifacts
